title: Reduce to two tutorial videos and replace with new YouTube Shorts

requirements.text: Update the TutorialsSection component to display exactly two embedded YouTube Shorts videos (down from three), replacing all current videos with the following URLs: https://youtube.com/shorts/JqKmxZaWp-c?si=7E8QCHCfhrr6MbST and https://youtube.com/shorts/gdBxIyO-cIg?si=JrNJOLP8-MV1Ov8w. Remove the third video card entirely. Maintain the existing 9:16 portrait aspect ratio embed style and layout.

quotes: Reduce the videos onsite by one and replace the remaining videos with : https://youtube.com/shorts/JqKmxZaWp-c?si=7E8QCHCfhrr6MbST https://youtube.com/shorts/gdBxIyO-cIg?si=JrNJOLP8-MV1Ov8w

acceptanceCriteria: TutorialsSection renders exactly two video embeds, not three
No old/previous video URLs remain in the component
Videos are displayed in 9:16 portrait aspect ratio consistent with the existing embed style
The two-video layout is visually balanced and consistent with the site's design system

constraints: Do not add any new videos beyond the two specified URLs
Preserve the existing embed aspect ratio (9:16 portrait) and styling approach
Do not modify any backend files
nonGoals: Adding new tutorial content or section copy beyond what already exists
Changing the channel CTA link or any other part of the TutorialsSection
